zh.lifeSummary: Amabilia De Lindsay是Gerard de Limesi和Amicia Bidun的女兒，於大約1130年出生在英國賀特福爾皮爾頓。她於1134年與Robert de Roppersley在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1207年之後在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾洛普斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Amabilia De Lindsay是Gerard de Limesi和Amicia Bidun的女儿，于大约1130年出生在英国賀特福爾皮爾頓。她于1134年与Robert de Roppersley在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1207年之后在英国英格兰林可爾史爾洛普斯利。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

en.lifeSummary: Amabilia De Lindsay was born about 1130, in Pirton, Hertfordshire, England as the daughter of Gerard de Limesi and Amicia Bidun. She married Robert de Roppersley in 1134, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1207, in Ropsley, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Amabilia De Lindsay est née environ 1130, à Pirton, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, fille de Gerard de Limesi et Amicia Bidun. Elle a épousé Robert de Roppersley en 1134, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 1207, à Ropsley, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amabilia De Lindsayは約1130年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアピルトンでGerard de LimesiとAmicia Bidunの娘として生まれた。1134年にイギリスでRobert de Roppersleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1207年以後にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアロプスリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amabilia De Lindsay(은)는 대략 1130년 영국 허트퍼드실르 피르턴에서 Gerard de Limesi(와)과 Amicia Bidun의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1134년 영국에서 Robert de Roppersley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1207년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 럽슬리에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Robert de Roppersley em 1134, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após 1207, em Ropsley, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Amabilia De Lindsay родилась около 1130 г. в местности пиртон, хиртфордшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Gerard de Limesi и Amicia Bidun. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Roppersley в 1134 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1207 г. в местности ропсли, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
